profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Personel Alih Daya Tbk provides labor services in Indonesia. It operates through Personel Support and Office Service, Call Center Service, Security Service, Technical and Maintenance, Courier, Fiber To The Home and Project Management Office, and Regional segments. The company offers office services; technical services, including building and network maintenance, electrical, site maintenance, roll out, network, power supply, office management, civil, and fiber to the home services; and security, training and education, K9, consultancy, and event and executive security; and customer care center services. It also provides training and consulting services; driver; landscaping and gardening; interior design; delivery and expedition; business support; courier; outdoor training; executive training; fixed wireless access; call centre and sales; and headhunter services, as well as retirement and certification programs. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Personel Alih Daya Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT. Kopindosat.
